entity.summary: UK-origin digital-payment and crypto conversion platform founded in 2014, offering fiat and cryptocurrency accounts, exchange functionality, cards, transfers, and related services under the Wirex brand.
entity.notes: The record remains in the frozen CEX queue, but Wirex is primarily a payments, account, card, and conversion platform rather than a conventional order-book exchange. The 2014 year marker is retained because accessible first-party materials do not establish a more precise platform-launch date.

expected.summary: United Kingdom-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Wirex Exchange brand.

evidence.title: Wirex official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current account, card, transfer, and crypto conversion services.

evidence.title: Wirex terms and legal disclosures
evidence.notes: The official legal materials provide jurisdiction-specific entity and service context.
